summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 43 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 227 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 121 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 36 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to Katie Holmes & Sean Springs, Clifford Clack — Gym Addition — cleared all overdue.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 46 days past due with 43 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. 2 tasks can't move until payments clear — escalate to Operations. **25 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $31,692 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 14 days past due with 42 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **37 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $14,440 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 17 days past due with 41 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **45 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 17 days past due with 31 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **78 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $26,324 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 34 days past due with 30 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,324 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 18 days past due with 5 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **25 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $14,342 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.
**Angel Pacheco:** Down to 4 overdue — making progress.

325 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **280 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 28 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$84,826 in payments going out this week** across 53 tasks — make sure funds are available. $48,033 expected in from 8 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 4. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 31 overdue (oldest: 17d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **78 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 94 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Clean — 1 tasks in progress. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **15 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 21 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 3. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 43 overdue (oldest: 46d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 2 tasks blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **25 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 28 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 42 overdue (oldest: 14d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **37 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 37 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 3 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 16. Keep the momentum going.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 41 overdue (oldest: 17d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **45 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 45 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** 30 overdue (oldest: 34d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 11 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 5 overdue (oldest: 18d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **25 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 37 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
